translation_notes: Mean reversion strategy entering on price deviation below SMA. Entry uses close crossing below SMA_20 (default). Exit on mean reversion (price crossing back above SMA). Stop-loss set at 2.0% as placeholder—requires actual threshold parameter. Direction is LONG based on 'enter long position' in rule. Target regime is RANGING as specified.
